title: lomariocycas longipinna
intro: Lomariocycas longipinna, also known as the fern cycad, is a rare and ancient plant species that belongs to the family Stangeriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Lomariocycas longipinna include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in tea or capsule form, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential as a medicinal agent.
